title: Avoid unnecessary calls to Container.Config() and Container.Spec()
body:
As mentioned in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/16117 there are more places in the codebase where we unnecessarily call these expensive functions. This removes a bunch of them by calling existing or new accessors, or in some cases by using .ConfigNoCopy() instead.

@vrothberg
